title: Methods Should Not Have Too Many Parameters
description: Methods with a long parameter list are difficult to use because maintainers must figure out the role of each parameter and keep track of their position. This rule raises an issue when a method has more parameters than the provided threshold.
recommendation: Split the method into smaller ones or find a better data structure for the parameters that group data in a way that makes sense for the specific application domain.
impact: Improves code readability and maintainability by reducing complexity.

checks.message: Split the method into smaller ones or find a better data structure for the parameters that group data in a way that makes sense for the specific application domain.
